sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kalsuan sim in, Honpa kamai ah pai hi,
A itna khut tawh hong makaih a,
Husan sim in Topa nangmah kong bia hi,
Nang mah tawh tonkhawm leng nuam ka sa,
Kalsuan simin, a hong pi ding ka thei a,
A sang zaw ah hong paipih tawntung hi,
Khatvei ni ciang lamtawpna ka tung ding a,
Kalsuan simin inn ka nai sem sem hi,
Ka upna tha khat vei vei ahong kiam ciang
Ki hei kikin kei hong Gumpa ka et ciang, H
ong ompih manin ka thahat hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Bang bang hong piang ta leh Pasian ka muang hi.
Nuntakna a mah sungah om hi,
Amah lampi a hong honsak thei Pa hi,
Khapsa gam nuam ah hong tun ding hi.
